creator: fidaj@ukr.net
text:
=D0=92 Tue, 10 Aug 2010 11:40:09 -0400
"Joseph S. Atkinson" <jsa@FreeBSD.org> =D0=BF=D0=B8=D1=88=D0=B5=D1=82:

> Test this please.

I have found in some header file is the description of "NAME_MAX" -
<sys /syslimits .h> you may want to replace all "_POSIX_HOST_NAME_MAX"
and accordingly add <sys /syslimits .h> where necessary? or, after all,
is to reduce everything to POSIX and replace all "NAME_MAX" to
"_POSIX_HOST_NAME_MAX" - how do you think?

P.S. your patch workable.
